negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Wallet validation does not recognize a 0x0808 agent-call precompile and therefore cannot require AGENT_MAX_ITERATIONS/AGENT_MAX_TOOL_CALLS escrow for that invariant path.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/wallet.rs does call agent_escrow_lockup(SOVEREIGN_AGENT_MAX_ITERATIONS, SOVEREIGN_AGENT_MAX_TOOL_CALLS) for SOVEREIGN_AGENT_PRECOMPILE.
The same file returns unsupported precompile for addresses without metadata, and crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs defines no 0x0808 agent-call metadata.

notes: Confirmed gap: sovereign-agent escrow is present, but the invariant names an AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE path that does not exist locally.
rationale: The wallet validation branch for AGENT_CALL_PRECOMPILE calls agent_escrow_lockup with system maximum iteration/tool-call constants before adding commitment and inclusion fees to total_required_fees. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Wallet validation for an agent-call async transaction must require executor escrow based on agent_escrow_lockup(AGENT_MAX_ITERATIONS, AGENT_MAX_TOOL_CALLS), in addition to normal async commitment and inclusion fees, rather than using HTTP output-size pricing or LLM model pricing.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct a 0x0808 async result and wallet state with balance just below and just above AGENT_MAX_ITERATIONS*AGENT_ITERATION_FEE_WEI + AGENT_MAX_TOOL_CALLS*AGENT_TOOL_CALL_FEE_WEI plus commitment/inclusion fees; assert validation fails below the threshold and passes above it when lock duration is sufficient.
summary: Agent wallet escrow is missing for the exact 0x0808 agent-call path.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Run verify_wallet_for_commitment for address 0x0808 with otherwise sufficient wallet state; the current code should return unsupported instead of applying worst-case agent escrow.
title: Agent wallet escrow uses worst-case work
